channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Pantheon: Rise of the Fallen's Combat and Progression PTR Opens This Week
item.content:encoded:
Pantheon: Rise of the Fallen’s Combat and Progression update public test realm will open this Wednesday. The PTR will launch with an early test build and add more of the huge series of updates and overhauls Visionary Realms plans to get the game into a 1.0 ready state.

The team laid out the details of what will be available in the first week, and how they plan to progress. In the first week, eight classes will be available to level 10. Also in are unified NPC templates, character attribute updates, including base skill updates (but no Mastery yet),  the new experience curve, and rested experience bonus, as well as the updated combat formulas. This first build also includes the first to engage tagging system (with the rules to help limit abuse of the system), bind on equip items, and the first iteration of the mail system.

They want feedback on everything and the whole experience, all of the new systems, and anything you might encounter but they also have a few specific areas they want to hear back on. For the first week that includes whether solo and small group difficulty feels right, feedback on the first to engage mechanics,  progression, how does rested experience feel, and general combat, among more specific questions you'll find in the PTR announcement.  the announcement also gives info on some of their plans for updates, data gathering, and more of how they're putting this huge update together.

The team is planning for new PTR updates every Wednesday.  Future systems that we'll see in later PTR updates include the Mastery system, the market system, spell pushback, updated class mechanics as well as additional classes, boats, and full crafting and gathering progression.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/pantheon-rise-of-the-fallens-combat-and-progression-ptr-opens-this-week-2000137973
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
